Author: GitHub
Description:
In episode 5 of the GitHub Copilot CLI for beginners series, we dive into the model context protocol (MCP). Learn how to give your AI agent access to external documentation, databases, and testing tools. We walk you through using the /mcp command to set up both local and remote servers. Watch as we use the Playwright and Svelte MCP servers to test and improve a web application.

#GitHubCopilot #CopilotCLI #MCP
